visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair styled in two buns, wearing a red tank top over a white top, sits in a green stadium seat. She looks around with a confused expression, holding a wooden stick near her mouth. The background shows blurred rows of green seats and a few distant figures. (2) On a black screen, text introduces the first segment. The woman appears again, tapping her fingers anxiously on her light blue denim jeans. She then tilts her head back and shouts intensely, accompanied by animated pink and yellow flame graphics overlaid on the screen. (3) The woman is seated with several open boxes containing various fast foods: a large hot dog, fried chicken pieces, and donuts. She takes a large bite of the hot dog and later a piece of fried chicken, looking extremely satisfied while chewing. (4) The woman interacts with an off-screen person while holding a smartphone. She appears puzzled, and a close-up insert shows a Google search for a Chinese term. She later smiles while looking at her phone, gesturing with her hand towards the screen. (5) The woman holds a large professional camera with a long white telephoto lens, aiming it as if taking sports photos. She then switches to her smartphone to record a selfie video, pointing at the signal bars on the screen. (6) The woman runs down the concrete stadium stairs excitedly. She stops to give a thumbs-up to the camera while holding her phone, which displays her own photo. Finally, she points directly at the lens with a confident smile against the backdrop of the stadium field.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV: 球場裡的幾種人. (2) [Variety]: 1. 情緒激動的資深球迷. [Variety]: (非常焦慮). [Logo]: 密%. [Subtitle]: 女士請你冷靜. (3) [Variety]: 2. 食物還是最重要的. [Variety]: 打出全壘打. [Variety]: (還在吃). [Variety]: (中場休息). [Variety]: (還是不停的吃). (4) [Variety]: 3. 棒球規則好難. [Subtitle]: 啊他怎麼不跑? 因為被接殺出局... 什麼是接殺啊? 吼你自己查啦!!! [Variety]: (你是第一天看棒球?). [Variety]: (小氣鬼). [Variety]: 超快速找到答案. [Subtitle]: 接殺 打擊者打出去 就被防守者接住了. [Slogan]: 有遠傳 又快又穩的網路 讓我瞬間秒懂規則. (5) [Variety]: (髮香區第一排). [Variety]: (跟著啦啦隊動次動?!). [Variety]: 手機也要發限動. [Subtitle]: 欸為什麼 你的網路可以傳這麼快 我都傳不出去欸. [Slogan]: 因為我用遠傳 新遠傳擁有業界最大 4G+5G總頻寬. [Variety]: (底下留言"好正"可獲得此桌布). [Variety]: (我開玩笑的). [Slogan]: 網速涵蓋全面升級. [Logo]: 遠傳5G滿格. [Subtitle]: 不管你是看球賽或是 去看演唱會 人再多都不怕 網路速度依舊 又快又穩 讓我現在在台中洲際球場 網路也是飆透透 大家看球賽 記得搭配遠傳電信喔. [Slogan]: 網路也是飆透透. [Variety]: (跟妳跑的一樣快?). [Variety]: (你也想跳啦啦隊?).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 1 female friend sitting nearby, and several blurred spectators in the stadium background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with her hair in two small buns, wearing a red tank top over a white undershirt and light blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a baseball stadium, featuring rows of green plastic seats with advertisements, concrete stairs, and a view of the green playing field in later shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively, high-tempo pop track with bright electronic synthesizers begins immediately. The main female voice enters with an inquisitive, slightly puzzled tone, speaking at a moderate pace. (2) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect punctuates a transition, followed by the woman's voice rising significantly in pitch and volume to simulate a loud shout. Crackling sound effects like a small fire burst are added for comedic emphasis. (3) The BGM continues with a bouncy rhythm as muffled crunching sounds are heard, mimicking someone eating crispy fried food. The woman speaks briefly with a muffled, playful voice quality, sounding extremely satisfied. (4) A bright "ding" notification bell rings out. Two female voices engage in a rapid dialogue; one sounds confused while the other sounds slightly impatient. The clicking sound of a phone keyboard is heard, followed by a "zip" sound to indicate speed. (5) Mechanical camera shutter clicks fire in rapid succession, layered over the energetic BGM. The woman's voice returns, now very clear and authoritative, delivering a promotional message with a high degree of confidence and a smiling vocal quality. (6) The sound of rhythmic footsteps on concrete is heard as the BGM swells in volume. The woman finishes with a cheerful call to action, peaking in arousal, and the track concludes with a final digital jingle chime.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Common Scenarios -> Technological Solution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote FarEasTone's 5G network speed and reliability by humorously portraying common relatable struggles (confusion, slow internet) at a crowded baseball stadium and showing how the brand's services solve them.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The protagonist directly mentions the brand 'FarEasTone' (遠傳) and its 5G network advantages, showing the logo on screen.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular short-form 'POV' comedy format to transition seamlessly into a commercial for a telecommunications provider.
